title: tp-run-full-design handoff envelope
description: Pre-split / cold-resume handoff worklist entry. When the orchestrator pre-splits a long tier into sequential dispatches (audit-by-dimension, plan-by-section, phase-by-phase), each checkpoint is committed at tp-designs/{slug}/.handoffs/{slot}-{attempt}-{N}.md as a markdown body with this schema embedded in a fenced json block. Standalone (not allOf base) — a handoff is not a tier-result envelope.
